name: sunset-erp
description: Sunset ERP monorepo root — DX scripts only; apps live in backend/ and frontend/

scripts.dev: concurrently -n services,backend,frontend -c yellow,blue,green "bash scripts/check-services.sh" "pnpm run dev:backend" "pnpm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: pnpm --dir backend build && pnpm --dir frontend build
